reviewer.description: Read-only code reviewer for ff-cli. Use after implementation for a fresh-context review of the diff and verification output.

review.description: Run a fresh-context ff-cli code review using the shared review contract
review.template:
Review the current changes using the contract in prompts/code-review.md.

Use this evidence:
- Diff stat: !`git diff --stat`
- Full diff: !`git diff`
- Verification: run or paste relevant lint, test, build, and smoke-test output.

If a handoff was provided, use it as context. Report findings in the required format and end with Verdict: accept or Verdict: revise. Do not edit files unless explicitly asked.
